changes.before: He led them between the tents fast enough to show what he had already chosen to leave undone for the next five minutes.
changes.after: He led them between the tents fast enough that the rest of the triage ground blurred past.

changes.before: He looked as if he had not sat since yesterday.
changes.after: He looked worn to the limit.

changes.before: Uther's mouth moved as if he had nearly smiled.
The plate on his left shoulder had been cracked and buckled, not repaired, only strapped down to keep riding.
changes.after: The plate on his left shoulder had been cracked and buckled, only strapped down to keep riding.

changes.before: Every sentence pointed toward one fact: the kingdom was feeding its own dead.
Arthas's eyes lifted from the map to her face for the first time.
changes.after: Arthas looked up from the map to her face for the first time.

changes.before: That earned the nearest thing to approval Sylvanas had yet seen in him.
Nobody spoke for a beat after that.
how many bodies a city that size could hide before it stopped hiding anything at all.
changes.after: how many bodies could disappear into a city that size before anyone understood the count.

changes.before: He had probably heard men speak to the prince in many tones.
changes.after: He had heard men speak to the prince in many tones.

changes.before: He could have ordered her. He spent the choice instead.
changes.after: He left the choice to her.

changes.before: Only a harder line to the mouth, as if she had already put the answer to work.
changes.after: Only a harder line to the mouth.

changes.before: Cyndia's eyes had gone to one of the quartermaster tables.
changes.after: Cyndia was looking at one of the quartermaster tables.

changes.before: An aide stood there helping sort route strips by district and gate mark, in plain campaign wool with dark hair damp at the temples and mud on the hem, built for camp anonymity.
changes.after: An aide stood there helping sort route strips by district and gate mark, in plain campaign wool with dark hair damp at the temples and mud on the hem, easy to miss in the rush.
